title: Range Hit Sounds 🔊
description: Plays a pling sound when hitting an entity at a configurable distance.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6614859ce09b0ba4bb52bb682b0350913e4dc69.png)

****
✅ This mod plays a pling sound when hitting an entity at a configurable distance.
****
🛠️ Mod menu supported https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu
****
🔊 Import custom sounds (the sound file has to be a ".ogg" audio file)
****
⚠️ This is the BETA Release so bugs can be expected, if you stumble across any issues then please contact the creator on discord @sscripted
